temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A close-up shows a man in a grey suit looking down with a worried expression. The reflection in his phone screen reveals Chinese characters that read '有内鬼终止交易' (There's a mole, transaction terminated). He then puts the phone to his ear, his face filled with concern. (Storyline: The scene opens with immediate tension, establishing that the man is involved in a high-stakes transaction that has been compromised by a mole.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A tense, high-pitched electronic sound effect plays, followed by a phone ringing tone.)
(00:03-00:05) The scene cuts to a dark, narrow hallway where several men in black suits are cautiously moving forward, guns drawn. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a man's face as he speaks into his phone, his expression serious and determined. (Storyline: This intercutting sequence builds suspense, showing the consequences of the failed transaction: a team is now on high alert, and the man on the phone is likely the leader coordinating the response.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The tense electronic music continues, linking the two scenes.)
